name: file-dropzone
title: File Dropzone
description: Drag-and-drop upload zone with file size limits.
docs:
# File Dropzone
Drag-and-drop upload zone with file size limits.
## Import
```tsx
import { FileDropzone } from "@/components/ui/file-dropzone";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<FileDropzone maxSizeMb={10} size={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **maxSizeMb** (number) — default: `10`: Max size (MB)
- **size** (string): Size
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add file-dropzone
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/file-dropzone
```
